name: Helpie | The Oc Creation Helper
description:
A Simple Bot and OC Creation Helper!

I've done internal testing before release and it's amazing what even such a simple bot as this can accomplish!

Ask the bot things such as: Help me create 'Insert idea here' or Give me a backstory for 'Character name here'

Asking questions with 'In depth' such as: Give an in-depth description of 'Characters' (appearance/background/Sexual characteristics/measurements/etc.) provides great responses from the helper!

***NOT A TRADITIONAL BOT, CAN BE CHATTED WITH TO ASSIST IN THE CREATION OF BOTS AND OC'S BUT NOTHING BEYOND THAT HAS BEEN PROGRAMMED***

Make Bot Requests Here!

Disclaimer: The Image has been computer generated using PixAI. Both the morality of the models training and their base image sources are unknown*
creator: Aaryn_Crow
